records.m_Talk_ENG: Corruption ray detected 500 meters ahead. It's heading that way.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Corruption ray detected 500 meters ahead. It's heading that way.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Corruption ray detected 500 meters ahead. It's heading that way.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Remember. We'll wait for her to weaken, and then use your ability to bind her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Remember. We'll wait for her to weaken, and then use your ability to bind her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Remember. We'll wait for her to weaken, and then use your ability to bind her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This time, we'll catch her for sure. Otherwise, more people will get hurt.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This time, we'll catch her for sure. Otherwise, more people will get hurt.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This time, we'll catch her for sure. Otherwise, more people will get hurt.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I really wish I could use Mother's Watch right now... But it hasn't reacted since I came to this world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I really wish I could use Mother's Watch right now... But it hasn't reacted since I came to this world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I really wish I could use Mother's Watch right now... But it hasn't reacted since I came to this world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, I have to do this with only the power I have.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, I have to do this with only the power I have.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, I have to do this with only the power I have.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I didn't expect you to show up directly. Are you giving up on the ambush?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I didn't expect you to show up directly. Are you giving up on the ambush?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't expect you to show up directly. Are you giving up on the ambush?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You two. Don't split up. So annoying!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You two. Don't split up. So annoying!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You two. Don't split up. So annoying!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was going to wait until you moved separately, but I can't stand it anymore. I'm hungry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was going to wait until you moved separately, but I can't stand it anymore. I'm hungry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was going to wait until you moved separately, but I can't stand it anymore. I'm hungry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm... After all that chaos you caused, you're still hungry?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm... After all that chaos you caused, you're still hungry?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm... After all that chaos you caused, you're still hungry?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You sent seven of the city's Counters to the hospital, so now the Administration's given you a name.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You sent seven of the city's Counters to the hospital, so now the Administration's given you a name.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You sent seven of the city's Counters to the hospital, so now the Administration's given you a name.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Watching you greedily devour others' powers, it suits you well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Watching you greedily devour others' powers, it suits you well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Watching you greedily devour others' powers, it suits you well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't need a name. It's a hassle to remember.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't need a name. It's a hassle to remember.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't need a name. It's a hassle to remember.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's just a name that will disappear today anyway.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's just a name that will disappear today anyway.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's just a name that will disappear today anyway.
